mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.stock, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.stock, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
